metadata.description: BrandBrain Claude Code plugin marketplace. Hosts the brandbrain plugin: a self-describing skill that lets Claude Code post, draft, schedule, and queue social content (LinkedIn, Instagram, X, Threads, and more) via the bb CLI.

plugins.name: brandbrain
plugins.description: Post, draft, schedule, and queue social content (LinkedIn, Instagram, X, Threads, and more) from Claude Code through the bb CLI. The skill is self-describing: Claude runs bb -h and bb <verb> -h at runtime to discover available platforms, formats, and flags. Includes an inline bb CLI bootstrap protocol so a fresh machine can go from claude plugin install to bb post without a separate installer.
